package rulecoverage

func NegativeHttpHandlerWithoutCsrfProtection() string {
    ruleID := "http_handler_without_csrf_protection"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "POST/PUT/DELETE handler registration without evidence of CSRF token middleware"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
